core_question: Does `git push -u origin feat/precision-first-phase0` successfully publish the 39 local-only commits to https://github.com/junjslee/sanomap_radiomics_layer.git without leaking secrets and without producing a non-zero exit code?
knowns: Branch was never pushed; `git ls-remote --heads origin feat/precision-first-phase0` returned 0 lines.
Operator selected 'Push feature branch as-is now' via AskUserQuestion this turn — explicit go-ahead.
Remote URL: https://github.com/junjslee/sanomap_radiomics_layer.git; operator username junjslee matches.
Force flags absent; remote branch absent; merge conflict surface 0.
8 Conventional commits encode load-bearing design; 28 chkpt commits are interim automation snapshots; 3 mixed.
Slice pilot PID 14151 writes to artifacts/pilot/ (gitignored); push writes to .git/ only — file scopes disjoint.
unknowns: Integer N1 returned by `git grep -ciE '(api[_-]?key|password|secret|bearer|GEMINI_API_KEY|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,})\s*[=:]\s*[\"\\']' HEAD -- ':!docs/' ':!*.md' ':!tests/' | wc -l`.
String V1 returned by `gh repo view junjslee/sanomap_radiomics_layer --json visibility -q .visibility`.
Integer N2 returned by `git grep -l 'BEGIN [A-Z ]*PRIVATE KEY' HEAD | wc -l`.
assumptions: Git credentials for origin are configured on this machine. Basis: prior git operations in this session succeeded without credential prompts.
GitHub repo visibility V1 equals 'PRIVATE'. Failure mechanism: a PUBLIC value exposes chkpt history of the governance incident plus the §3 redesign reasoning to the open internet.
The chkpt-laden history is acceptable as a pre-PR durable backup; chkpt→Conventional consolidation is a separately-gated deferred history rewrite.
disconfirmation: Boolean expression `(N1 > 0) OR (git push exit code != 0) OR (N2 > 0)` evaluates to True.
